3101980.name: Friends' Kitchen
3101980.description:
Cook up chaos, serve the laughter!
Friends’ Kitchen is a fast-paced cooking and serving game for 1–4 players. Prepare dishes in the right order, manage your kitchen flow, overcome silly accidents (burning pans, slippery floors, clumsy collisions!), and deliver plates right on time.

⭐ Key Features

  • 1–4 Players: Dive into the kitchen chaos solo or with friends.

  • Teamwork Required: Split the roles — chopping, cooking, plating, serving.

  • Rising Chaos: Every stage adds new layouts, hazards, and funny surprises.

  • Variety of Recipes: Pizza and more, with endless ingredient combos.

  • Short & Replayable: 8–12 minute rounds that beg for “just one more game”.

  • Laughter Guaranteed: Friendly rivalry and hilarious fails will test friendships.

🍳 How to Play

  • Check the Orders: Watch the order screen to see which ingredients are needed.

  • Gather Ingredients: Prepare dough, sauce, etc, in the right order.

  • Chop & Cook: Slice ingredients, throw them into the oven or onto the stove.

  • Plate & Serve: Move the finished dish onto a plate and deliver it on time.

  • Embrace the Chaos: Burning pans, slippery floors, and collisions… react fast!

  • Score Points: Serve quickly and accurately to hit the highest scores.

Warning: This game may cause laughter and friendly rivalry!
